rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.0056, which concerns informational materials on educational residential placement options for children near state supported living centers.
quote: The Health and Human Services Commission, in collaboration with the agency and stakeholders who represent the full continuum of educational residential placement options, shall develop and provide to the agency materials regarding educational residential placement options for children who may qualify for placement in a state supported living center.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject (educational residential placement materials) with no fiscal or operational linkage to homestead exemption levels.
